Committed to making credit accessible to Indians in a fair and convenient manner, Rupeek pioneers innovative financial products focused on monetizing India's $2 trillion gold market. Leveraging state-of-the-art technology and an automated asset-light supply chain, Rupeek is transforming the gold loan disbursal landscape across 40+ cities in India. With a customer base exceeding 5,00,000+, the company's strategic partnerships with top banks and financial institutions underscore its commitment to building gold-backed assets through low-risk, low-touch, and friction-free processes.Rupeek's impressive journey is supported by key investors such as Sequoia Capital, Accel Partners, Bertelsmann, and GGV Capital. In Apr 2024, Rupeek turned profitable and raised 200Cr.+ in equity capital from Manipal Group and Elevation Capital to fund its next phase of growth. Join us in redefining the future of finance through innovation, technology, and a commitment to financial inclusivity.Job Title: Product ManagerExperience: 2-5 years of experience in related fieldLocation: BangaloreAbout the role:As a Product Manager at Rupeek, you will own and enhance user journeys across our web and app platforms, ensuring seamless, delightful, and impactful customer experiences. You’ll work closely with business, design, and engineering teams to translate customer insights into scalable product features that drive adoption, engagement, and satisfaction.Key Responsibilities:Run growth hacking experiments (onboarding, funnel optimization, referral loops, pricing/promo tests) to drive adoption and reduce drop-offs.Identify customer pain points through data, feedback, and research; prioritize impactful product solutions.Own end-to-end customer journeys — from discovery to post-loan engagement.Lead Product-Led Growth (PLG) initiatives by improving activation, engagement, retention, and conversion through product improvements.Collaborate cross-functionally with design, tech, and operations to deliver intuitive, high-performing features.Define product metrics, track performance, and iterate based on learnings.Drive experiments (A/B tests, pilots) to validate hypotheses and optimize user experience.Act as the voice of the customer in product discussions, ensuring empathy-driven design and execution.Skills & Experience:2–5 years of experience as a Product Manager, preferably in fintech, consumer tech, or digital platforms.Strong understanding of customer lifecycle management and user experience.Hands-on experience with product analytics tools (e.g., Mixpanel, Amplitude, GA).Proven ability to work with engineering and design teams in agile environments.Excellent communication, problem-solving, and prioritization skills.A bias for action, experimentation, and customer-centric thinking.Experience with Product-Led Growth (PLG) and growth frameworks (AARRR, funnel and cohort analysis).Strong experimentation mindset with hands-on experience driving growth experiments and translating insights into product iterations.Why Join UsJoin a dynamic fintech on a strong growth trajectory.Work on challenging compliance matters and meaningful corporate initiatives.Thrive in a collaborative culture with cross-functional exposure.

Rupeek, established in 2015 and headquartered in Bangalore, stands as India's leading asset backed digital lending fintech platform. Committed to making credit accessible to Indians in a fair and convenient manner, Rupeek pioneers innovative financial products focused on monetizing India's $2 trillion gold market. Leveraging state-of-the-art technology and an automated asset-light supply chain, Rupeek is transforming the gold loan disbursal landscape across 40+ cities in India. With a customer base exceeding 5,00,000+, the company's strategic partnerships with top banks and financial institutions underscore its commitment to building gold-backed assets through low-risk, low-touch, and friction-free processes.


Rupeek's impressive journey is supported by key investors such as Sequoia Capital, Accel Partners, Bertelsmann, and GGV Capital. In Apr 2024, Rupeek turned profitable and raised 200Cr.+ in equity capital from Manipal Group and Elevation Capital to fund its next phase of growth. Join us in redefining the future of finance through innovation, technology, and a commitment to financial inclusivity.


Job Title: Product Manager

Experience: 2-5 years of experience in related field

Location: Bangalore


About the role:

As a Product Manager at Rupeek, you will own and enhance user journeys across our web and app platforms, ensuring seamless, delightful, and impactful customer experiences. You’ll work closely with business, design, and engineering teams to translate customer insights into scalable product features that drive adoption, engagement, and satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Run growth hacking experiments (onboarding, funnel optimization, referral loops, pricing/promo tests) to drive adoption and reduce drop-offs.
  • Identify customer pain points through data, feedback, and research; prioritize impactful product solutions.
  • Own end-to-end customer journeys — from discovery to post-loan engagement.
  • Lead Product-Led Growth (PLG) initiatives by improving activation, engagement, retention, and conversion through product improvements.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with design, tech, and operations to deliver intuitive, high-performing features.
  • Define product metrics, track performance, and iterate based on learnings.
  • Drive experiments (A/B tests, pilots) to validate hypotheses and optimize user experience.
  • Act as the voice of the customer in product discussions, ensuring empathy-driven design and execution.


Skills & Experience:

  • 2–5 years of experience as a Product Manager, preferably in fintech, consumer tech, or digital platforms.
  • Strong understanding of customer lifecycle management and user experience.
  • Hands-on experience with product analytics tools (e.g., Mixpanel, Amplitude, GA).
  • Proven ability to work with engineering and design teams in agile environments.
  • Excellent communication, problem-solving, and prioritization skills.
  • A bias for action, experimentation, and customer-centric thinking.
  • Experience with Product-Led Growth (PLG) and growth frameworks (AARRR, funnel and cohort analysis).
  • Strong experimentation mindset with hands-on experience driving growth experiments and translating insights into product iterations.


Why Join Us

  • Join a dynamic fintech on a strong growth trajectory.
  • Work on challenging compliance matters and meaningful corporate initiatives.
  • Thrive in a collaborative culture with cross-functional exposure.

items.descriptionHtml:
About the Role

We're looking for an AI Product Manager who builds, not just specs. This is not a traditional PM role. You won't write requirements and wait for designers or developers to pick them up.

You'll use Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI tools to prototype working solutions yourself. You'll ship fast, learn from users, and iterate.


What You'll Do

Product Discovery & Strategy

• Own the roadmap for core organic growth platform features

• Run continuous discovery: user interviews, data analysis, competitor research

• Identify gaps and opportunities before they're obvious

• Make prioritization calls based on user impact and business value


Build & Ship

• Prototype working solutions using AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Replit)

• Work with engineers to refine and ship production-ready features

• Move from idea to testable prototype in hours, not weeks

• Maintain a high-quality bar while moving fast.


Research & Competitive Intelligence

• Track competitors obsessively: new features, positioning, pricing moves

• Stay ahead of AI search platform changes (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI)

• Synthesize trends into actionable product insights

• Share intelligence across the team regularly


Data & Optimization

• Live in product analytics tools daily (Amplitude, Mix panel, or similar)

• Define and track key KPIs for your features

• Run experiments and measure impact

• Use data to kill features that aren't working


The profile we are looking For


Builder PM

• You prototype solutions, not just document requirements

• You use AI tools to move at 10x speed

• You have enough engineering background to be dangerous

• Obsessed with competitors and market shifts

• Balances speed with quality

• Takes ownership of outcomes, not just outputs


Must-Haves

• 3+ years in product at a fast-moving startup (AI company preferred)

• Hands-on experience with AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, or similar)

• Some software engineering background (you can read and write code)

• Strong UX instincts: you think like a user

• Data-driven: you use analytics tools daily, not weekly

• High ownership: you see problems and fix them without being asked

• Taste: you know what good looks like


AI Fluency (Non-Negotiable)

• Power user of Claude Code, Cursor, or similar for daily work

• Already using AI coding tools to prototype and build

• Comfortable learning new AI tools in days, not months

• Treats AI as how you work, not an add-on

Job Title: Azure Product Manager

About Us

“Capco, a Wipro company, is a global technology and management consulting firm. Awarded with Consultancy of the year in the British Bank Award and has been ranked Top 100 Best Companies for Women in India 2022 by Avtar & Seramount. With our presence across 32 cities across globe, we support 100+ clients across banking, financial and Energy sectors. We are recognized for our deep transformation execution and delivery.

WHY JOIN CAPCO?

You will work on engaging projects with the largest international and local banks, insurance companies, payment service providers and other key players in the industry. The projects that will transform the financial services industry.

MAKE AN IMPACT

Innovative thinking, delivery excellence and thought leadership to help our clients transform their business. Together with our clients and industry partners, we deliver disruptive work that is changing energy and financial services.

#BEYOURSELFATWORK

Capco has a tolerant, open culture that values diversity, inclusivity, and creativity.

CAREER ADVANCEMENT

With no forced hierarchy at Capco, everyone has the opportunity to grow as we grow, taking their career into their own hands.

DIVERSITY & INCLUSION

We believe that diversity of people and perspective gives us a competitive advantage.


• Role: Product Owner – Azure Platform

• Department: End User Computing – Content & Collaboration

• Location: Bangalore, India

Job Description Overview

A Product Manager for an Azure product typically has a dynamic and multifaceted role.

An Azure Product Manager plays a crucial role in overseeing the development and maintenance of Microsoft’s Azure cloud services. Here are some key responsibilities and duties typically associated with this role:

Adheres to and promotes the company values and ethical framework, ensuring that the team operates to the same code of conduct Leads an environment where people management and development is a top priority. Empowers, manages, coaches and mentor’s direct reports and others in the organization and holds their teams accountable for strong people management practices Brings diverse teams together to collaborate on topics to achieve optimal ideas and recommendations Drives the achievement of high performance overseeing effective career management, providing equitable opportunities, driving succession planning and talent management processes to ensure continuous development of people capability & delivery of results Acts as a role model for own team, communicating SMART business driven objectives at the beginning of the year, ensuring every team member has regular, continuous and constructive performance reviews, encouraging career development and mobility, nurturing talent and fostering diversity. Proactively manages tough people decisions to ensure people performance is aligned with organization imperatives and needs. Addresses individual performance issues, where necessary, to drive for high performance.

Shared Responsibilities

• Availability of end user products to underpin the banks delivery of core business applications

• Architectural standards implemented within the end user device products in line with all control function requirements and policies including Security (CSO), Compliance and GDPR and End User Architecture, Standards and Governance

• Procurement of underpinning contracts to support the supply chain and services from resellers and managed service providers in conjunction with Global Procurement

• Enforcement of End User Availability Management standards

• Business Engagement in conjunction with End User Customer Services

Your key responsibilities

• Strategy and roadmap of Azure platform

• Technology roadmap compliance of all Azure services

• Defining the requirements and prioritization of book of work for the Azure

• Ensure Architectural standards implemented within the end user device products in line with all control function requirements and policies including Security (CSO), Compliance and GDPR and End User Architecture, Standards and Governance

• Ownership of risks associated with email platforms

• Working Knowledge on SDLC platforms (Jira, JAMA) and Agile methodology

• Definition and maintenance of all tiers of Azure Services

• Stakeholder, Business and Clients engagements

• ITAO for relevant products

• Vendor Governance of outsourced components and services

Your skills and experience:

• Understanding of how Azure works

• Working knowledge of SDLC and Agile

• Have done requirement gathering, stakeholder management and vendor management

• Cost and Budget management

• Product adoption and forecasting

• Strategy, Product Roadmap and Risk management

• Compliance & Security

o Ensure adherence to data governance, eDiscovery, and audit requirements

o Collaborate with InfoSec and Legal teams to manage risk and regulatory compliance.

Performance & Metrics

o Define KPIs and success metrics for platform usage, engagement, and operational efficiency.

o Monitor analytics and user feedback to inform product enhancements and evolve product capabilities.

User Experience:

o Advocate for an intuitive and accessible user experience, ensuring tools are optimized for productivity and collaboration.

Agile Leadership:

o Act as the Product Owner in Agile development processes, maintaining a well-defined backlog, writing user stories, and ensuring timely delivery of features.


If you are keen to join us, you will be part of an organization that values your contributions, recognizes your potential, and provides ample opportunities for growth. For more information, visit www.capco.com. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

items.description: Why this exists What if the app that handles your home's money actually understood how homes work? Fave is a UPI app built around homes, not individuals. Flatmates splitting rent and groceries. Dual-income couples managing a household together. Families paying the cook, the maid, the driver. The everyday money that moves between the people you live with — finally in one placeThe role UPI apps today are utilities. Open, pay, close. Nobody thinks about them. Nobody talks about them. That's the gap. Fave is the chance to build a payments app people actually have feelings about. One that understands the weird, messy, real ways money moves inside a home — and makes all of it effortless. If we get this right, we're the operating layer for how Indian households manage money together. You'd own the product end-to-end. Not a feature. Not a pod. The whole thing — payments, household features, growth loops, monetization, whatever comes next. There's no VP of Product handing you a roadmap. You'd be shaping what Fave becomes. Day to day, you'll write specs that people actually want to read (yeah. writing is a good proxy for thinking, so we strongly encourage writing instead of generating). You'll think about how a payments screen becomes a reason someone tells their flatmate to download the app. You'll also build. Prototype a feature before writing the spec. Ship a growth hack over the weekend. Build an agent that automates a product ops workflow you're tired of doing manually. AI is how a small team punches above its weight — and you'll use it that way every dayWhat you'll spend time on: Defining what Fave builds next — and, harder, what it doesn't Designing product experiences alongside our designer. You have taste. Use it Obsessing over activation and retention as much as shipping Thinking about distribution as a product problem: referrals, sharing moments, screenshots people actually post Talking to users constantly Who we're looking for We want instinct. The best PMs we've met don't reach for a prioritization matrix when they're stuck. They look at the product, talk to three users, and know. Frameworks are fine. But if that's where your conviction comes from, this isn't the role. 4-6 years building consumer mobile apps. You've shipped things real people use daily You've been close to zero-to-one at least once. You know the difference between growing something that exists and willing something into existence Strong product taste — you notice when a flow is off, when copy is lazy, when an animation is 100ms too slow You think about distribution before you think about features. "How does this spread?" is always the first question AI-native. You've built prototypes, automated workflows, or shipped something real using LLMs and AI tools. You treat AI as a multiplier on your output, not a noveltyBonus: You've worked at a company small enough that you couldn't hide behind process. You've made something go viral at least once, even if by accident.

Why this exists

What if the app that handles your home's money actually understood how homes work? Fave is a UPI app built around homes, not individuals. Flatmates splitting rent and groceries. Dual-income couples managing a household together. Families paying the cook, the maid, the driver. The everyday money that moves between the people you live with — finally in one place


The role

UPI apps today are utilities. Open, pay, close. Nobody thinks about them. Nobody talks about them. That's the gap. Fave is the chance to build a payments app people actually have feelings about. One that understands the weird, messy, real ways money moves inside a home — and makes all of it effortless. If we get this right, we're the operating layer for how Indian households manage money together. You'd own the product end-to-end. Not a feature. Not a pod. The whole thing — payments, household features, growth loops, monetization, whatever comes next. There's no VP of Product handing you a roadmap. You'd be shaping what Fave becomes. Day to day, you'll write specs that people actually want to read (yeah. writing is a good proxy for thinking, so we strongly encourage writing instead of generating). You'll think about how a payments screen becomes a reason someone tells their flatmate to download the app. You'll also build. Prototype a feature before writing the spec. Ship a growth hack over the weekend. Build an agent that automates a product ops workflow you're tired of doing manually. AI is how a small team punches above its weight — and you'll use it that way every day


What you'll spend time on:

Defining what Fave builds next — and, harder, what it doesn't Designing product experiences alongside our designer. You have taste. Use it Obsessing over activation and retention as much as shipping Thinking about distribution as a product problem: referrals, sharing moments, screenshots people actually post Talking to users constantly


Who we're looking for

We want instinct. The best PMs we've met don't reach for a prioritization matrix when they're stuck. They look at the product, talk to three users, and know. Frameworks are fine. But if that's where your conviction comes from, this isn't the role. 4-6 years building consumer mobile apps. You've shipped things real people use daily You've been close to zero-to-one at least once. You know the difference between growing something that exists and willing something into existence Strong product taste — you notice when a flow is off, when copy is lazy, when an animation is 100ms too slow You think about distribution before you think about features. Product Manager


Location: Bangalore


About the Team

Navi’s Product Team builds solutions that are simple, scalable, and centered on real user needs. The team strongly collaborates across functions-engineering, design, data, and business-to turn insight into impact.


About the Role

As a Product Manager at Navi, you will champion the voice of the customer and drive the development of innovative financial solutions, aiming to solve finance for a billion people. You will be responsible for the end-to-end management of your product area the critical backend systems that power key financial decisions from conception through launch and beyond. Your work will directly influence the speed, accuracy, and fairness of financial products for millions of Indians.

This role requires a proactive approach to understanding customer and system requirements through detailed market research, user testing, and deep data analysis. You will independently spearhead initiatives, define and analyse critical metrics to gauge product success, and lead a cross-functional team including engineering, design, data science, and more, to achieve outstanding product outcomes. This role is ideal for someone with a strong foundation in product thinking and a passion for delivering impactful solutions with increasing independence.


Key Responsibilities

- Develop a strong understanding of our customers and internal platform users, leveraging this insight to craft differentiated user experiences.

- Independently define the roadmap and strategy for your product area, ensuring alignment with broader business objectives.

- Formulate product strategy and recommendations primarily through hands-on data investigation and experimentation, prioritising quantitative insights to drive your roadmap.

- Drive the development and continuous improvement of products based on thorough market research and user feedback.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products with minimal oversight.

- Define, track, and immerse yourself in performance metrics, analysing the effectiveness of core decisioning models to uncover deep insights that guide all future product iteration.


Must Haves

- 4+ years of relevant product management experience, preferably in a fast-paced, digital-first environment.

- Demonstrated empathy towards the needs, concerns, and experiences of end-users.

- Strong foundation in technology and first-principles product thinking.

- Advanced problem-solving skills with a structured and analytical approach.

- Proven ability to make data-driven decisions through direct, hands-on quantitative analysis that leads to successful business outcomes.

- A fundamental understanding of data science concepts and how they apply to product development is highly desirable.

- Ownership mindset with a high drive for achieving excellence and winning in the market.

- Excellent communication skills, capable of effectively articulating complex ideas to diverse audiences.

- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business Administration, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.


About Navi

We are on a mission to make finance simple, accessible and affordable for a billion Indians. Guided by a strong customer-first approach, we are building tech-first solutions that work at scale. Our offerings include a range of financial products and services across Loans, Insurance, Mutual Funds, Digital Gold and UPI.


Founded by Sachin Bansal & Ankit Agarwal in 2018, we are one of India’s fastest-growing financial services organisations. But we’re just getting started!


Our Culture

At Navi, we’re a place where ambition meets opportunity and ideas turn into impact quickly. We empower people with high ownership from the start, encouraging them to solve meaningful problems and build with excellence. Teams here work in an environment that values speed, collaboration and craftsmanship, while celebrating learning, growth and shared wins along the way. Whether you’re shaping the future of fintech products or driving innovation behind the scenes, life at Navi means being part of a high-energy, talent-driven workplace where your contributions truly make a difference.We’re guided by our own operating system - The Navi OS - a set of principles that shape how we work and win together. You can explore them at navi.com/our-values to see what drives us every day.


If this feels like you, Navi is the place to grow, thrive and make a real impact.

Define and communicate product and portfolio strategy through roadmaps aligned to enterprise objectives, customer outcomes, OKRs/KPIs, and platform direction.

Own prioritization and trade-off decisions across portfolios and backlogs, balancing customer experience, business value, technical feasibility, cost, return on investment, operational readiness, and risk.

Drive alignment across teams to minimize overlapping work, manage dependencies, and coordinate integrated delivery for complex, cross-domain initiatives.

Partner closely with Product Manager to Translate complex business needs into capabilities, features, user stories, and acceptance criteria; ensure teams maintain a continuously “ready” backlog.

Partner closely with engineering, architects, and data teams on requirements definition, solution design, data flows, integration patterns, and architectural considerations.

Facilitate cross-functional decision-making in alignment with enterprise governance, business strategy, and technology standards; negotiate solutions to achieve win-win outcomes.

Establish and sustain stakeholder feedback loops (business, end users, operations) to inform roadmap evolution and continuous improvement.

Support financial and investment management for the capability/portfolio by partnering with finance and operations on CBA/ROI, funding, and benefits realization

Product Management @ Pharmeasy


We are looking for a Product Manager to own the B2C growth Funnel for the PharmEasy App . which includes Pharma , Diagnostics, Doctor consult & Healthcare services. This role is pertaining to managing diagnostics business end to end including funnel optimization, Top of funnel build up, Experience management. In addition, This role includes building end to end healthcare journey of user and improve their health using AI tools. Role will require heavy exposure to AI backed product management.


Are you passionate about solving problems through technology, customer obsessed, flexible, analytical, strategic yet execution focused and passionate about e-commerce and unlocking next phase of growth using AI? If yes, a Product Management role at Pharmeasy gives you a chance to be a part of the Health-tech revolution in India & build products for scale.


Responsibilities

  • Develop a vision & roadmap for your Product area for the next phase of growth
  • Drive execution on the roadmap, partnering with the development teams, design, QA and cross-functional stakeholders
  • Be analytical and data-driven - dig into the data to understand what's happening and define & measure success of every project
  • Communicate clearly and confidently


What are we looking for?

  • 5+ years of hands-on experience in product management in high scale consumer internet companies
  • Bachelor's degree in Engineering
  • Management degree from a top Business school is a plus
  • Solid track record of building and shipping multiple products with high business impact
  • Prior experience in managing PnL of business from product lens is a plus
  • Experience of working with multiple stakeholders and demonstrating a high degree of influence across several teams/functions
  • Excellent problem solving, critical thinking, and communication skills
  • Highly customer obsessed thinking with deep understanding of customer needs and aspirations
  • Previous start-up experience is a strong plus
  • Exposure to AI based product management and building great ROI products is a strong plus

items.descriptionHtml:
Do you want to lead the creation of digital products that help in the transformation of public health impacting millions of people worldwide?


About eGovernments Foundation & DIGIT:

eGov is a global, mission-driven organization and a catalyst for digital transformation in public service delivery. We are a multi-disciplinary team of technologists, policy thinkers, program specialists, and problem solvers united by a shared mission — to reimagine how essential public services are designed and delivered, making them equitable, accessible, and transparent for all.

Our open-source platform, DIGIT, enables countries to build and scale digital public infrastructure (DPI) across sectors like health, sanitation, water, public finance, and climate. We collaborate closely with governments, communities, and ecosystem partners to drive sustainable, at-scale transformation.

Over the past two decades, eGov has partnered with 10+ countries and 2,600+ towns and cities in India, improving the lives of over 1.8 billion people. We’ve helped power national missions, deliver billions of vaccine certificates, and support governments to design and sustain digital infrastructure needed to deliver public services at scale.


Why work with us?

● Create massive societal impact through your work

● Be part of a team using technology to solve real-world problems and improve lives

● Receive mentorship from world-class people and access rich global ecosystems

● Grow your skills in a culture that values innovation, collaboration, and excellence


Read more about our work: https://egov.org.in

At eGov, we are committed to creating a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workplace. We actively seek to recruit, develop, and retain talented individuals from all backgrounds. As an equal opportunity employer, we welcome people from all experiences, abilities, and perspectives to join our mission.


Be a part of something bigger and join our growing product team!


The Role


As the Product Manager - Digital Health (Public Health), you will lead the development and execution of product strategies that address complex public health challenges. You will work closely with internal teams and external stakeholders—including healthcare providers, community organizations, and public health authorities—to design and deliver scalable products that improve health outcomes at a population level.


What you’ll do -

  • Lead a Product Portfolio That Solves for Billions: You’ll oversee a suite of digital health products that address real-world public health challenges—health equity, disease prevention, and access to care. Every product you manage will have the potential to save lives and improve the well-being of communities.
  • Mentor Future Change-Makers: You’ll guide a team of passionate product folks, helping them grow and empowering them to innovate at scale.
  • Build Products with Impact: You’ll work closely with designers, engineers, public health experts, and community organizations to create products that make a difference.
  • Shape the Future with Data: Use data and analytics to shape product decisions, measure real-world outcomes, and iterate on solutions that address critical health gaps.


What You Bring:

  • Experience That Drives Change: 5+ years of product management experience, focusing on healthcare, digital health, or public health. You’ve led the development of impactful products from ideation to launch.
  • Leadership with Purpose: Proven experience managing a portfolio of products, while mentoring and developing a team of product managers.
  • A Heart for Public Health: A deep passion for solving systemic health challenges and making a difference in underserved communities.
  • Data-Driven Mindset: You’re not just interested in shipping products—you want to measure their success and continuously improve them based on real-world data


What skills and experience will help you succeed in this role:

  • Product Management Experience: You know the art and method to take products from concept to scale. You excel in user research, product prioritisation, and prototyping.
  • Public Health Expertise: You have experience in public health or healthcare, with a strong understanding of health systems, disease surveillance, and the challenges faced by frontline workers.
  • Technical and Analytical Skills: You are familiar with healthcare data standards (e.g., HL7, FHIR) and have experience with health technology systems, including EHRs and HIEs.


Why You’ll Love Working Here:

  • Make a Massive Impact: Solve wicked problems and build products that drive significant societal change.
  • Shape the Future: You'll lead a talented team and help shape a portfolio of solutions that can change the world.
  • Learn from the Best: Receive mentorship from leading experts and professionals within our rich ecosystem, broadening your perspectives and expertise.
  • Supportive Culture: A collaborative, flexible, and supportive environment where your voice is heard, and your leadership is valued.


Interested candidates can apply through the following link.

https://forms.gle/P57443ZiDs69QX618

hackajob is collaborating with J.P. Morgan to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.

Job Description

Our team is at the heart of building and improving tooling that supports all aspects of Chase offering including new market expansion. We are looking for solution-oriented, commercially minded, customer-focused product managers, used to working in an agile environment who want to be a part of building exceptional user experience within a diverse and inclusive team.

As a Product Manager - Vice President at JPMorganChase within the International Consumer Bank, you are an integral part of the team that innovates new product offerings and leads the end-to-end product life cycle. As a core leader, you are responsible for acting as the voice of the customer and developing profitable products that provide customer value. Utilizing your deep understanding of how to get a product off the ground, you guide the successful launch of products, gather crucial feedback, and ensure top-tier client experiences. With a strong commitment to scalability, resiliency, and stability, you collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products that exceed customer expectations.

You will lead the development, testing, implementation and maintenance of CRM platform to enable delivery of industry-leading customer service experience.

Job Responsibilities

  • Define the roadmap and objectives for our customer service operations technology platform
  • Take responsibility for the successful delivery of the product, ensuring that it meets the acceptance criteria of your stakeholders
  • Partner with the Tech Lead to ensure alignment and feasibility of product, technical vision, and requirements
  • Create testing and implementation plans
  • Ensure the product meets all legal, regulatory, risk, and control requirements
  • Be hands-on, detail-oriented, and outcome-focused as well as a strong team player

Required Qualifications, Capabilities And Skills

  • Demonstrate expertise in delivering and scaling customer service operation technology products
  • Have experience in a complex software environment with Agile/Scrum development
    • Show strong experience with planning, prioritizing, and maintaining product backlogs
    • Demonstrate strong experience assessing value, developing cases, and prioritizing stories, epics, and themes to ensure work focuses on those with maximum value and is aligned with product strategy
    • Possess expert-level knowledge in Agile principles, processes, and best practices
    • Exhibit strong experience with hypothesis-driven development, product experimentation, and product analytics
  • Communicate strongly and feel comfortable explaining design, architecture, and roadmap to a wide range of audiences from both technology and business backgrounds
Preferred Qualifications, Capabilities And Skills

  • Good understanding of process mapping
  • Experience with Customer Relationship Management and Operations or Customer Service
  • Knowledge of Salesforce out of the box functionality and tools

ABOUT US

JPMorganChase, one of the oldest financial institutions, offers innovative financial solutions to millions of consumers, small businesses and many of the worldâs most prominent corporate, institutional and government clients under the J.P. Morgan and Chase brands. Our history spans over 200 years and today we are a leader in investment banking, consumer and small business banking, commercial banking, financial transaction processing and asset management.

We recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. We are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. We also make reasonable accommodations for applicantsâ and employeesâ religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. Visit our FAQs for more information about requesting an accommodation.

About The Team

Our professionals in our Corporate Functions cover a diverse range of areas from finance and risk to human resources and marketing. Our corporate teams are an essential part of our company, ensuring that weâre setting our businesses, clients, customers and employees up for success.

The Digital team is dedicated to creating innovative, industry-leading products and experiences that help customers access, share and control their financial data so they can make smart decisions with their money. Teams enable innovation while adhering to the firmâs data sharing principles of security, customer control and convenience, and privacy.

items.descriptionHtml:
Senior Product Manager – Platform Efficiency & COGS

About The Role

As a Senior Product Manager for Platform Efficiency, you will drive continual “cost to value” alignment by delivering the product features and platform enhancements that ensure durable efficiency of scale. You will sit at the intersection of Product, Engineering, FinOps, and Pricing - responsible for the architectural efficiency and gross margin health of our global SaaS analytics platform.

Sumo Logic processes hundreds of terabytes of data daily. Your mission is to ensure that as we scale, our infrastructure costs stay lean and our platform remains a performant, competitive, and high-margin engine. You will own the strategy for optimizing data ingestion, storage, networking, and compute costs while simultaneously improving the platform’s performance and reliability.

Key Responsibilities

  • COGS Strategy & Roadmap: Own the end-to-end roadmap for platform efficiency. Identify, prioritize, and execute initiatives that reduce cost-to-serve without compromising customer experience or SLAs. Own product strategy to focus on customer margins across multiple Sumologic revenue products
  • Infrastructure Optimization: Collaborate with Core Platform and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) teams to optimize resource allocation across Kubernetes, Kafka, and AWS services (S3, DynamoDB, EC2).
  • Cost Observability: Partner with FinOps to ensure internal "Cost Observability" dashboards inform continual efficiency improvements. Use data to identify "hot spots" in our AWS/Cloud infrastructure and drive targeted architectural shifts.
  • Product Improvement Lifecycle: Translate complex technical bottlenecks into actionable PRDs. Define "Definition of Done" for efficiency projects, focusing on metrics like Cost per GB Ingested and Cost of Query engine, CPU utilisation of engineering assemblies.
  • Cross-Functional Leadership: Coordinate across Finance, UX, and Engineering stakeholders to deliver cost optimized solutions that meet the needs of customers as well as the financial goals of the business. Clearly articulate the financial impacts of technical debt and infrastructure modernization to executive stakeholders.
  • Vendor & Cloud Management: Work with cloud providers and 3rd party vendors to optimize licensing, reserved instances, and usage-based billing models.

What We’re Looking For

  • Technical Depth: You have a solid understanding of cloud-native architectures, distributed systems, and microservices. Experience with AWS cost structures and FinOps principles is a major plus.
  • Data-Driven Mindset: You are a power user of data analytics tools and have a strong hold on cost and numbers. You don’t just report data; you find the "why" behind the numbers to drive strategic pivots.
  • SaaS Savvy: 5+ years of PM experience, ideally in a technical platform role within an Enterprise SaaS environment (Log Analytics, Observability, or Cybersecurity).
  • Execution Focus: Proven track record of taking high-level efficiency goals and breaking them down into testable hypotheses and delivered features.
  • Communication: Ability to explain the ROI of a "refactoring project" to a non-technical stakeholder just as clearly as you can discuss API rate-limiting with a Principal Engineer.

Pricing Knowledge: Experience with pricing, units of measure, and cost modeling.

 Technical Toolkit (Nice to Have)

  • Experience with Big Data technologies (Lucene, Parquet, Spark).
  • Familiarity with billing and provisioning systems (e.g., Zuora).
  • Understanding of OpenTelemetry (OTel) and its impact on data pipeline efficiency.

Why Join Sumo Logic?

You will be working on one of the largest scale data problems in the industry. Your work directly impacts the company’s bottom line and determines our ability to innovate by freeing up capital for new product investments.

About Us

Sumo Logic, Inc. helps make the digital world secure, fast, and reliable by unifying critical security and operational data through its Intelligent Operations Platform. Built to address the increasing complexity of modern cybersecurity and cloud operations challenges, we empower digital teams to move from reaction to readiness—combining agentic AI-powered SIEM and log analytics into a single platform to detect, investigate, and resolve modern challenges. Customers around the world rely on Sumo Logic for trusted insights to protect against security threats, ensure reliability, and gain powerful insights into their digital environments. For more information, visit www.sumologic.com.

Sumo Logic Privacy Policy. Employees will be responsible for complying with applicable federal privacy laws and regulations, as well as organizational policies related to data protection.

  • Past exposure in either self serve B2B product journeys.
  • You have worked with complex / large tech systems and not just with linear point solution products.
  • You have a strong understanding of Data and AI Products, i.e. products that assimilate millions of data sources to generate intelligence.

👯 What qualities we look for in our team members?

While there is no stencil for the type of people we like, there are a few traits that might make Reo.Dev a better fit for you. Reo.Dev might be a good fit if you:

  • Work hard, hands-on (that’s very important to us!) and want to grow really fast.
  • Care about your work a great deal, find it highly unsettling if the quality of work is even slightly sub-par.
  • Execute fast (we will not have elaborate reporting structures for the foreseeable future and hopefully ever).
  • Are someone people like to work with, low on ego, high on humility.
  • Have the ability to fail, learn and keep trying till you win. Start-ups are tough and we will not get everything right the first time.
  • Have a longish view of your career growth and not optimising for the next 1-2 years

🚁 If the above sounds exciting and something you would like to do, please apply here: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/reo-dev/2c15f9a7-51ad-4ebb-8d3e-c8e63bc67cc4

items.descriptionHtml:
About The Team

Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rapacious growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.

Fun fact: Nearly 5% of India’s households shop with us.

As a Product Manager I, in our team, you will collaborate with Developers, other Product Managers, Designers, Data Scientists, and Engineers. We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our PMs are driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.

But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us!

About The Role

We are looking for a Product Manager 1 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.

What You Will Do

  • Market & Customer Understanding: Understand the e-commerce market and needs of customers/sellers deeply through landscape analysis, customer interviews, user research, competition analysis and other qualitative/quantitative techniques.
  • Problem Identification & Prioritization: Adopt a structured approach to identify what problems need to be solved and break them down into smaller chunks. Prioritize what problems need to be solved now vs. later.
  • Solution Discovery: Facilitate a process to come up with the best technology-led ideas to solve the prioritized problems. Harness the creativity of not just yourself but of other teams such as design, engineering., business, etc Be willing to experiment with multiple solution ideas and test them using MVPs, prototypes, etc.
  • Product Delivery: Define detailed product requirements and work collaboratively with a cross-functional team (design, engg. business, analytics, etc.) to bring a product to life. Ensure high product quality through processes such as user acceptance testing, dogfooding, etc.
  • Go-to-Market Planning: Create a go-to-market plan working with business/marketing stakeholders to maximize product adoption and success.
  • Adoption & Metrics: Define product metrics for your area, and track them continuously. Identify usage patterns and come up with action plans to move metrics in the right direction.
  • Roadmap Creation: Create a product roadmap for your area that has at least a 3-month forward-looking view of key customer/business problems to be solved.


What You Will Need

  • Overall experience of 3+ yrs with at least 2+ yrs in product management in a tech-led company (consumer internet space is preferred).
  • Exceptional problem solving skills based on first principles thinking.
  • Good understanding of technology, and comfort with product management processes such as A/B experimentation, writing product requirement documents, managing product backlogs, and creating roadmaps.
  • Good communication and stakeholder management skills to get work done across different functions and drive product development.

items.descriptionHtml:
Senior Product Manager

Location: Bengaluru, India

Department: Product Management


About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own the product roadmap and delivery for one of Aurigo's core product lines. You will work directly with engineering, design, customers, and the sales team to define what gets built, ensure it is built right, and enable the go-to-market team to position and sell it effectively. This is a high-ownership role for a product manager who is equally comfortable in front of a customer as they are writing a detailed product requirement.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • Own and manage the end-to-end product roadmap for your assigned product line, aligning with company strategy and customer needs.
  • Work closely with engineering teams to define requirements, write detailed user stories, and ensure on-time, high-quality delivery.
  • Conduct regular customer discovery through interviews, site visits, and sales cycle participation to deeply understand buyer pain points and jobs to be done.
  • Translate customer insights and market research into clear product requirements and prioritized backlogs.
  • Collaborate with product marketing to develop positioning, value propositions, and sales enablement content for your product area.
  • Partner with the Director to manage stakeholder expectations, communicate roadmap decisions, and handle escalations.
  • Define and track product success metrics including adoption, net revenue retention impact, and customer satisfaction.
  • Support pre-sales activities including customer demos, RFP responses, and technical discovery calls.
  • Represent the voice of the customer in sprint planning, design reviews, and release decisions.
  • Maintain a deep understanding of the competitive landscape for your assigned product area.


Soft Skills

  • Strong external-facing presence. Able to build credibility with senior government executives, procurement officers, or commercial capital program leaders.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills including the ability to present to senior stakeholders.
  • Strategic thinker who can also execute and is comfortable moving from market analysis to detailed backlog grooming.
  • Strong cross-functional collaboration and ability to influence without authority.
  • High ownership mindset with comfort operating in ambiguity.


Hard Skills

  • Strong product discovery and requirements definition skills.
  • Experience managing agile backlogs and working directly with engineering teams.
  • Ability to conduct and synthesise customer research into actionable product decisions.
  • Experience supporting sales cycles and contributing to go-to-market activities.
  • Data-driven decision-making and the ability to define metrics and use data to prioritize.


Technical Skills

  • Proficiency with product management tools such as Jira, Aha, Confluence, and Figma.
  • Understanding of SaaS platform architecture and API-based integrations.
  • Familiarity with AI-assisted workflows and enterprise software configuration.
  • Ability to read and interpret technical documentation and contribute to integration discussions.


Educational Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or a related field. MBA from a premium institution preferred.


Prior Experience

  • 8 or more years of experience in product management, with at least 3 years in a senior role.
  • Experience managing B2B SaaS products, preferably for enterprise or government markets.
  • Proven track record of delivering products from discovery through launch and adoption.
  • Experience working in or selling to capital-intensive industries in the public or commercial sector is preferred.
  • Demonstrated ability to engage directly with customers and sales teams in a product capacity.


About Aurigo

Aurigo is an AI‑native capital program management platform trusted by over 300 customers managing more than $300 billion in capital programs across North America. With over 40,000 projects delivered, Aurigo helps organisations in transportation, water and utilities, healthcare, higher education, and government plan, build, and manage infrastructure with confidence. Recognised as one of the Top 25 AI Companies of 2024 and a Great Place to Work for three consecutive years, we leverage artificial intelligence to create smarter, more connected outcomes. At Aurigo, we don’t just build software—we help shape the future of infrastructure.

items.descriptionHtml:
Job Title: Senior Product Manager


Company: Verse Innovation (Dailyhunt)

Location: Bangalore

WFO: Hybrid

Type: Full-Time


About Verse Innovation :

VerSe Innovation is the parent company of platforms like Dailyhunt, Josh, and since 2024, Magzter. The company is headquartered in Bengaluru and focuses on AI-powered local language content, digital media, creator ecosystem, and ad-tech solutions.


Job Description:

Verse Innovation is seeking a talented and motivated Senior Product Manager with 6-10 years of experience to join our dynamic and innovative product team. As an SPM at Verse Innovation, you will play a pivotal role in creating user-centric digital experiences that cater to our diverse & very large user base. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver engaging solutions that meet our users' needs. We are launching new agentic Ai products for the world, join us & be part of the revolution.


Responsibilities:

  • Define the product vision and strategy. This includes understanding the needs of the customer, identifying market opportunities, and developing a plan to bring the product to market.
  • Gather requirements and specifications. This involves working with stakeholders to understand their needs and translating them into technical requirements.
  • Design the product. Work with the design team to create wireframes, mockups, and prototypes to test and refine the product's design.
  • Develop the product. This involves working with engineers and designers to build the product according to the specifications.
  • Test the product. This involves running usability tests and beta tests to ensure that the product meets the needs of the customer.
  • Launch the product. This involves marketing and distributing the product to the target market.
  • Gather feedback and iterate. This involves collecting feedback from users and making changes to the product to improve it.


⠀Qualifications:

  • 6-10 years of experience in product management or a related role.
  • Good conceptual tech understanding of how android ios web apps & backend works
  • Strong understanding of product development, marketing, and data analysis.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work cross-functionally with engineers, designers, and other stakeholders.
  • Ability to think strategically and solve problems.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

  • If you are a motivated Senior Product Manager with a passion for improving experiences and are excited about the opportunity to work on a product like Dailyhunt, we encourage you to apply and be part of our journey.

items.descriptionHtml:
Product Manager

BASIC SUMMARY:

We are seeking a forward-thinking Product Manager to shape and advance the strategy, development, and evolution of our healthcare claims administration platform. In this role, you will manage the product lifecycle from concept through release, driving initiatives that address complex business challenges and deliver measurable value to customers. You will partner across the organization to define requirements, prioritize features, and ensure solutions are aligned with market trends, regulatory needs, and our long-term product vision.

The ideal candidate blends healthcare industry expertise with strong product management skills, bringing a data-informed, customer-centric approach to decision-making. Experience leveraging AI-enabled tools to accelerate requirements definition, backlog management, and analysis is a plus.

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

Product Strategy & Roadmap Execution

  • Contribute to the product roadmap in partnership with senior product leadership, ensuring alignment with market needs, business priorities, and strategic objectives
  • Identify and evaluate opportunities to enhance product competitiveness through emerging technologies, regulatory changes, or evolving customer needs
  • Collaborate with engineering, design, and quality assurance teams to deliver features that meet scope, quality, and timeline commitments
  • Develop clear, value-driven epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria informed by market insights and stakeholder input
  • Actively participate in Agile ceremonies and ensure delivery plans remain on track and adaptable to shifting priorities

Market Insight & Requirements Leadership

  • Gather and synthesize insights from customers, market research, and internal teams to inform product decision
  • Translate complex business requirements into actionable development items, leveraging AI-enabled tools for efficiency and consistency
  • Prioritize backlog items based on business impact, market urgency, and customer value
  • Partner with compliance teams to ensure product features meet healthcare regulations and security standards

Cross-Functional Influence & Collaboration

  • Serve as a bridge between technical and non-technical teams, ensuring shared understanding of product goals and constraints
  • Work closely with UX/UI to advocate for user-centered design and optimal user experiences
  • Partner with customer success, support, and marketing to enable effective go-to-market strategies, adoption, and customer education
  • Engage with leadership to provide visibility into progress, risks, and product performance metrics

Product Performance & Continuous Improvement

  • Analyze product usage data, KPIs, and customer feedback to identify enhancements and drive continuous optimization
  • Support impact analysis for proposed changes and contribute to release planning to ensure seamless delivery
  • Maintain awareness of industry shifts, competitive offerings, and payer/provider needs to inform future iterations and long-term vision

MINIMUM REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Healthcare Administration, Computer Science, or a related field
  • 5+ years of experience in product management, business analysis, or Agile product delivery
  • Familiarity with healthcare or healthtech domains, ideally in payer systems or claims processing
  • Experience working with cross-functional teams in a SaaS or software development environment
  • Experience with Agile tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence) for backlog and requirements management
  • Familiarity with AI-powered tools for requirements generation or analysis (preferred, not required)
  • Understanding of Agile software development methodologies (Scrum or Kanban)
  • Basic understanding of APIs, system integrations, and technical product documentation
  • Working knowledge of healthcare claims workflows, medical billing, and reimbursement models
  • Familiarity with healthcare regulatory frameworks (HIPAA, HITECH) and data standards (HL7, X12, FHIR)
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills
  • Detail-oriented with excellent organization and documentation abilities
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with shifting priorities
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team

Preferred Qualifications

  • Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO), Pragmatic Institute, or equivalent certification
  • Experience supporting AI-driven or data-intensive product initiatives
  • Exposure to healthcare cloud solutions or interoperability platforms
  • Knowledge of payer systems, provider workflows, or value-based care initiatives

items.title: Product Manager, Amazon Business India
items.workType: Project Management, Management, and Product Management
items.description: DescriptionOpportunity: The IN B2B market is made of 63 MM Micro & Small Customers and 0.5MM Medium & Large customers together spending $400B annually. That is the market segment that the Amazon Business team is creating solutions for.Problem: Over the past many years, individual shoppers in India have come to appreciate the convenience, infinite selection and competitive pricing that Amazon offers.While Indian businesses want many of the same benefits listed above, e-commerce is still not a preferred/ reliable purchase option for them. That is because the needs of the Indian businesses are different from that of individual shoppers and the current state of consumer-oriented B2C platforms does not fully address the requirements of a business purchase. That is the problem that the PM team at Amazon Business intends to solve. We intend to make buying online as simple, reliable and cost-effective for businesses as it is for individuals.This means that the PMs in Amazon Business India have to re-look at every aspect of the customer's journey - browsing, selection, price display, checkout, payment, delivery and returns experience and enhance them to fir the needs of the business customer. items.descriptionHtml:
Description

Opportunity: The IN B2B market is made of 63 MM Micro & Small Customers and 0.5MM Medium & Large customers together spending $400B annually. That is the market segment that the Amazon Business team is creating solutions for.

Problem: Over the past many years, individual shoppers in India have come to appreciate the convenience, infinite selection and competitive pricing that Amazon offers.

While Indian businesses want many of the same benefits listed above, e-commerce is still not a preferred/ reliable purchase option for them. That is because the needs of the Indian businesses are different from that of individual shoppers and the current state of consumer-oriented B2C platforms does not fully address the requirements of a business purchase. That is the problem that the PM team at Amazon Business intends to solve. We intend to make buying online as simple, reliable and cost-effective for businesses as it is for individuals.

This means that the PMs in Amazon Business India have to re-look at every aspect of the customer's journey - browsing, selection, price display, checkout, payment, delivery and returns experience and enhance them to fir the needs of the business customer. In addition, the team has to build new products - approval workflows, GST compliance, multi-user accounts, spend analytics reports etc. to address unique requirements of Indian business customers. We have the same complex problems, ambiguity, fast pace you see in a startup - but contained within the larger Amazon organization.

The Role: This role will own the charter to significantly improve Enterprise procurement experience by partnering with tech teams, global/IN product development teams, marketing, operations, legal, accounting, tax, and finance teams. The roadmap will be a mix of IN first innovations and of IN adaptations of global product features.

The ideal candidate is someone who is enthusiastic about managing challenging, ambiguous projects across multiple teams and locations. He or she is comfortable marshaling large amounts of data to make decisions and build business cases.

The right candidate will share Amazon's passion for the customer—someone who understands the importance of compelling features and functionalities in driving great customer and seller experience.

Basic Qualifications

  • 2+ years of product management experience
  • Experience managing technical products or online services
  • Experience in product, program, or project management in leading cross-functional teams in delivery of major new products or services

Preferred Qualifications

  • Knowledge of SQL and VBA at an advanced level
  • Experience building and analyzing cost/benefit scenarios and business cases and communicating results throughout the organization

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

items.descriptionHtml:
Acceldata is reimagining the way companies observe their Data!

Acceldata is the pioneer and leader in data observability, revolutionizing how enterprises manage and observe data by offering comprehensive insights into various key aspects of data, data pipelines and data infrastructure across various environments. Our platform empowers data teams to manage products effectively by ensuring data quality, preventing failures, and controlling costs.

Position Overview

The Senior Product Operations Manager is responsible for enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of product development and management processes within the organization. This role bridges gaps between product teams, engineering, marketing, and other stakeholders to ensure streamlined operations, data-driven insights, and successful product outcomes.

By optimizing workflows, implementing scalable systems, and fostering cross-functional collaboration, this role directly contributes to organizational growth and product excellence.

Key Responsibilities

Oversee the end-to-end product lifecycle, including planning, development, launch, and post-launch evaluation, ensuring timely delivery and alignment with strategic objectives.

Coordinate and manage user testing initiatives, including recruitment, session facilitation, feedback synthesis, and integration of insights into product iterations.

Analyze product performance using tools such as Pendo, generating actionable insights on user behavior, feature adoption, and engagement metrics to inform prioritization and optimization.

Leverage JIRA to manage workflows, create operational reports and dashboards, and develop custom queries to support product planning, sprints, and cross-team visibility.

Develop and maintain operational frameworks, tools, and processes that enable product teams to improve data collection, analysis, and reporting for informed decision-making.

Facilitate communication and collaboration across departments, resolving bottlenecks and promoting transparency to enhance productivity.

Lead initiatives to implement and integrate product management software, analytics platforms, and other technologies to improve operational efficiency.

Conduct regular audits of product operations, identifying areas for improvement and driving continuous process enhancements.

Collaborate with senior leadership to align product operations with business goals and provide insights on metrics, performance trends, and potential risks.

Mentor junior team members and contribute to the development of best practices in product operations.

Demonstrate leadership capabilities, including the ability to influence stakeholders, drive initiatives, and maintain high standards of professionalism and adaptability.

Commit to fostering healthy cross-functional relationships and upholding collaboration, accountability, and excellence in execution.

Qualifications And Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field; Master’s degree preferred.

5–8 years of professional experience in product operations, product management, or a closely related operational role within a technology or product-driven environment.

Proven expertise in managing cross-functional teams and projects, with a strong track record of improving operational processes and delivering measurable results.

Hands-on experience with Pendo for Product Analytics including session replays, path analysis, feature tagging and custom reporting.

Advanced proficiency in JIRA including workflow configuration, JQL Queries, Automation rules and integrating with reporting rules.

Demonstrated ability to design, execute and analyse user testing programs ( e.g. usability studies, A/B tests, beta programs) using qualitative and quantitative methods.

Strong analytical abilities including proficiency in data analytics tools such as Google Sheets, Excel and SQL and with experience in product metrics, KPIs, and data interpretation.

Familiarity with Product Management tools and platforms including but not limited to JIRA, Tableau and Google Analytics.

Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to present complex informationclearly to diverse audiences.

Strategic mindset with a detail-oriented approach, thriving in collaborative environments focused on product operational excellence.

We care for our team

  • Mentorship & Growth
  • ESOPs
  • Medical and Life Insurance
  • Paid Maternity & Parental Leave
  • Corporate Uber Program
  • Learning & Development Support

Acceldata for All

We are a fast-growing company, solving complex data problems at scale. We are driven by strong work ethics, high standards of excellence, and a spirit of collaboration. We promote innovation, commitment, and accountability. Our goal is to cultivate a healthy work environment that fosters a sense of belonging, encourages teamwork, and brings out the best in every individual.

 Why Acceldata?

Acceldata is redefining data observability for enterprise data systems. Founded by experts who recognized the need for innovative monitoring and management solutions in a cloud-first, AI-driven environment, our platform empowers data teams to effectively manage data products. We address common challenges such as scaling and performance issues, cost overruns, and data quality problems by providing operational visibility, proactive alerts, and monitoring reliability across the various environments.

Delivered as a SaaS product, Acceldata's solutions have been embraced by global customers, such as HPE, HSBC, Visa, Freddie Mac, Manulife, Workday, Zoominfo, GSK, Oracle, PubMatic, PhonePe (Walmart), Hersheys, Dun & Bradstreet, and many more. Acceldata is a Series-C funded company and its investors include Insight Partners, March Capital, Lightspeed, Sorenson Ventures, Industry Ventures, and Emergent Ventures.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

items.descriptionHtml:
Product Manager – Supply Chain & Operations

What Makes This Role Exciting

Product Strategy & Ownership

  • Own the product vision and roadmap for end-to-end supply chain systems covering demand planning, procurement, production planning, warehousing, inventory, and logistics
  • Translate business goals such as freshness, fill rate, cost optimization, and SLA adherence into measurable product outcomes and KPIs
  • Identify opportunities for automation, digitization, and process optimization across supply chain operations
  • Drive scalable product solutions that improve operational efficiency and business performance

Execution & Delivery

  • Lead product discovery, prioritization, and execution across internal operational platforms
  • Create detailed PRDs, define user journeys, and collaborate closely with Engineering, Design, and Operations teams
  • Drive data-backed experimentation and continuous process improvements
  • Ensure timely delivery of high-impact features in a fast-paced environment

Demand, Inventory & Planning

  • Build products that enhance demand forecasting, replenishment planning, and inventory optimization
  • Partner with Data Science teams to develop forecasting models and decision-support systems
  • Enable real-time visibility into inventory, wastage, fulfillment, and operational capacity across multiple nodes
  • Improve inventory turns while maintaining service levels and operational efficiency

Operations & Reliability

  • Design systems that improve traceability, compliance, and quality control across supply chain workflows
  • Build operational dashboards, alerting systems, and exception management frameworks
  • Balance platform stability and operational reliability with rapid product iteration in a 24x7 environment
  • Improve process visibility and operational decision-making through scalable internal tools

Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the primary product stakeholder for Supply Chain and Operations leadership
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with Finance, Category, Retail, and Business teams on cost, margins, and product availability
  • Drive roadmap prioritization by balancing operational requirements, customer impact, and technical scalability
  • Influence strategic product decisions across multiple business functions

What We’re Looking For

Experience

  • 6–10 years of Product Management experience in Supply Chain, Logistics, Manufacturing, Retail Operations, FMCG, or related domains
  • Hands-on experience building internal operational platforms or enterprise workflow products
  • Proven track record of delivering complex, scalable products in high-growth or high-volume environments

Skills & Capabilities

  • Strong analytical and structured problem-solving skills
  • Data-driven mindset with experience working on metrics, dashboards, operational KPIs, and forecasting models
  • Ability to thrive in ambiguous and evolving operational environments
  • Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills
  • Strong execution ownership with a focus on operational impact

Good to Have

  • Experience in fresh food, cold chain, or perishable supply chain environments
  • Exposure to demand forecasting, inventory optimization, WMS, TMS, or supply chain planning systems
  • Experience collaborating with Data Science or Optimization teams
  • Familiarity with operational analytics and supply chain automation initiatives

items.description: About the Role:We are looking for an experienced Senior Product Manager to own product development for Neo’s HNI wealth management business. This role is for someone who can go deep into ambiguous problems, break them into clear product requirements, work closely with engineering and design, and drive execution from idea to adoption. The ideal candidate has built 0→1 products, worked on products at scale, is strong in user behavior and UX thinking, understands technical trade-offs, and is hands-on with AI tools and automation. Responsibilities:● Own product strategy, roadmap, and execution for HNI-focused products.● Deeply understand banker, client, operations, and investment workflows. ● Break complex business problems into clear product requirements, flows, and milestones. ● Work closely with engineering to identify blockers, clarify trade-offs, and unblock execution. ● Collaborate with designers to create intuitive, high-trust user experiences for bankers and HNI clients. ● Use data, user research, and behavioral insights to improve adoption, conversion, engagement, and efficiency. ● Build products across areas such as client onboarding, portfolio review, banker productivity, client engagement, reporting, and workflow automation. ● Stay hands-on with AI tools and identify opportunities to use AI, automation, agentic workflows, LLM orchestration, and RAG. ● Communicate clearly with leadership, business, compliance, design, engineering, and operations teams. ● Ensure products are shipped, adopted, measured, and continuously improved. Requirements:● 5+ years of product management experience. ● Strong problem-solving ability with a structured, first-principles approach. ● Strong execution mindset and ability to drive cross-functional teams. ● Good understanding of user behavior, UX, and product design. ● Ability to understand technical constraints and communicate them clearly to stakeholders. ● Hands-on experience using AI tools for research, analysis, documentation, prototyping, or workflow automation. ● Excellent written and verbal communication skills. ● Ability to work with data, funnels, dashboards, and product analytics.
items.descriptionHtml:
About the Role:


We are looking for an experienced Senior Product Manager to own product development for Neo’s HNI wealth management business.


This role is for someone who can go deep into ambiguous problems, break them into clear product requirements, work closely with engineering and design, and drive execution from idea to adoption.


The ideal candidate has built 0→1 products, worked on products at scale, is strong in user behavior and UX thinking, understands technical trade-offs, and is hands-on with AI tools and automation.


Responsibilities:


● Own product strategy, roadmap, and execution for HNI-focused products.

● Deeply understand banker, client, operations, and investment workflows.

● Break complex business problems into clear product requirements, flows, and milestones.

● Work closely with engineering to identify blockers, clarify trade-offs, and unblock execution.

● Collaborate with designers to create intuitive, high-trust user experiences for bankers and HNI clients.

● Use data, user research, and behavioral insights to improve adoption, conversion, engagement, and efficiency.

● Build products across areas such as client onboarding, portfolio review, banker productivity, client engagement, reporting, and workflow automation.

● Stay hands-on with AI tools and identify opportunities to use AI, automation, agentic workflows, LLM orchestration, and RAG.

● Communicate clearly with leadership, business, compliance, design, engineering, and operations teams.

● Ensure products are shipped, adopted, measured, and continuously improved.


Requirements:


● 5+ years of product management experience.

● Strong problem-solving ability with a structured, first-principles approach.

● Strong execution mindset and ability to drive cross-functional teams.

● Good understanding of user behavior, UX, and product design.

● Ability to understand technical constraints and communicate them clearly to stakeholders.

● Hands-on experience using AI tools for research, analysis, documentation, prototyping, or workflow automation.

● Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

● Ability to work with data, funnels, dashboards, and product analytics.
